rightValue.stringValue: Not a Good Fit: Use Case / Persona / Industry
Not Ready / Bad Timing / No Interest

rules.name: Copy_from_Email_Address_domain_type

Flow.description: MIS-8199 - MSL - Lead Status to SDR Prospecting MIS-7999 - Added Student Bypass SFMC checkbox MIS-7317 - Add Counter Field for Web Form Submissions on Lead/Contact MIS-6931 - Lugia Linkedin Profile MIS-6321 - Sync to SFMC logic update MIS-6072 - MIR Status Updates MIS-6050 - Change Last Owner Assigned to Date/Time MIS-5968 - Count MIR Owners MIS-5740 - Update Last Owner Assigned Date

formulas.name: MaxByMaxFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 10 ), 10, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 50 ), 50, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 200 ), 200, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 500 ), 500, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 1000 ), 1000, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 5000 ), 5000, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}> 5000, 10000, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MaxByMinFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 10 ), 10, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 50 ), 50, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 200 ), 200, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 500 ), 500, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 1000 ), 1000, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 5000 ), 5000, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}> 5000, 10000, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MinByMaxFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 10 ), 1, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 50 ), 11, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 200 ), 51, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 500 ), 201, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 1000 ), 501, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 5000 ), 1001, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}> 5000, 5001, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MinByMinFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 10 ), 1, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 50 ), 11, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 200 ), 51, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 500 ), 201, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 1000 ), 501, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 5000 ), 1001, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}> 5000, 5001, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.description: Turns True if one of the following Polygraph fields has updated
formulas.name: Polygraph_Fields_formula
Website_Domain_formula
formulas.expression: If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "www."), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "http://www."), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "https://www."), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "http://"), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "https://"), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8) ), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 1, LEN({!$Record.Website}))) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 1, FIND('/', {!$Record.Website}) - 1), {!$Record.Website} ) ) ) ) ) )

Flow.label: Lead Created - Before Save
